name_en: 💕 M61731 Pink, Purple, Magenta, Red, Coffee, Black. Multi-functional card holder. Made of soft Monogram canvas with a colorful lining! Extremely elegant and lightweight. Coin pocket design is more practical. 12 card slots. Fixed metal clasp on the front. Dimensions: 12.0 x 10.0 cm.
